steps.title: Use unyielding as the clue
steps.content: The passage contrasts candidates with nuanced, compromising views against speeches with unyielding rhetoric. The blank should therefore describe views that are rigid rather than flexible.

steps.title: Reject the wrong meanings
steps.content: Choice A means wavering or indecisive, Choice C means dull or ordinary, and Choice D means insincere. None matches rigid, unyielding views. The answer is B.
